name: repo-doctor-skills
description: A bilingual, cross-platform AI Skills framework for repository diagnosis, code review, document review, and safe agent workflows.

scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-yaml-schemas.mjs && node scripts/validate-skills.mjs && node scripts/check-skill-quality.mjs && node scripts/check-user-docs.mjs
scripts.test: node scripts/test-skill-activation.mjs && node scripts/test-repo-doctor-workflows.mjs && node scripts/test-maintainer-tools.mjs && node scripts/test-build-integrity.mjs && node scripts/test-repo-doctor-sync.mjs && node scripts/test-user-docs.mjs && node scripts/test-release-metadata.mjs
scripts.build: node scripts/build-skills.mjs && node scripts/sync-productivity-toolkit-plugin.mjs && node scripts/sync-skill-maintainer-plugin.mjs && node scripts/build-chatgpt-skills.mjs && node scripts/check-skill-quality.mjs --check-dist
